message:
feat(frankenterm/main): tick 238 event-annotation audit cluster cx-first (4 sites) (ft-xbnl0.2.3)

Continues tick 237's main.rs storage-write surface migration. 4
sites in the event-annotation audit cluster — all inside the
`RobotEventsCommands` handlers (event annotate, triage, label
set/clear):

1. L18736 annotate note save (set_note/clear_note)
2. L18842 triage set (handled/unhandled)
3. L18951 label set branch
4. L19020 label clear branch (caught by replace_all with site 3)

All route through `record_audit_action_redacted_with_cx(&storage_cx, audit)` →
storage write path → send_with_cx mpsc backpressure (tick 176).

Standard `Cx::current().unwrap_or_else(for_request)` pattern. Used
`replace_all=true` for the label set/clear branches since they had
identical surrounding code structure — single edit, two migrations.

Verification: `cargo check -p frankenterm --bin ft` compiles clean
via fork bypass (CC=llvm clang, CARGO_TARGET_DIR=/tmp/ft-rusticmaple-target).

Progress: 7/~15 storage-write sites in main.rs migrated through
ticks 237-238. Remaining ~8 sites across:
- L24514 human send audit
- L25752, L25825, L25899, L25947 workflow-related
- L26682 prepare audit
- L21907 accounts upsert
- L22803, L23395 saved-search CRUD
- L24105, L24180 pane-bookmark CRUD

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
